name: collector
summary: Novel platform collection and ingestion module

commands.name: open
commands.summary: Print the collector module discussion file path

commands.name: show
commands.summary: Display the collector module discussion notes

commands.name: inspect
commands.summary: Inspect a local user-provided novel text export and preview detected chapters

args.name: --input
args.summary: Path to the local txt/md novel export

commands.name: import-text
commands.summary: Import a local user-provided novel text export into a structured novel project

args.name: --input
args.summary: Path to the local txt/md novel export

args.name: --out
args.summary: Output novel project directory

args.name: --title
args.summary: Novel title override

args.name: --author
args.summary: Novel author override

args.name: --platform
args.summary: Source platform name, default: fanqie

commands.name: tomato-start
commands.summary: Start Tomato Novel Downloader Web UI and configure the default raw save path

args.name: --addr
args.summary: Listen address, default: 127.0.0.1:18423

args.name: --save-path
args.summary: Raw txt/cache save path, default: collector\books\.tomato-raw

args.name: --restart
args.summary: Restart the recorded Tomato server process before starting

commands.name: tomato-download
commands.summary: Download a Tomato novel by book_id and export chapters as Markdown files

args.name: book_id
args.summary: Tomato novel book_id or share URL containing the book_id

args.name: --range-start
args.summary: Optional first chapter number to download

args.name: --range-end
args.summary: Optional last chapter number to download

args.name: --out
args.summary: Books output root, default: D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\novel-writing\collector\books

args.name: --no-export
args.summary: Only download raw txt; skip Markdown chapter export

commands.name: tomato-export-md
commands.summary: Split a Tomato downloader txt file into novel-name/chapter Markdown files

args.name: input
args.summary: Raw txt file downloaded by Tomato Novel Downloader

args.name: --out
args.summary: Books output root, default: collector\books

args.name: --title
args.summary: Novel title override for the output folder name

args.name: --overwrite
args.summary: Overwrite existing chapter Markdown files for this novel

commands.name: tomato-rank
commands.summary: Screen Tomato novels by rough popularity/heat metrics from search results

args.name: --keywords
args.summary: Comma-separated search keywords, default covers common genres/tropes

args.name: --limit
args.summary: Maximum ranked results to keep, default: 30

args.name: --out
args.summary: Ranking report output directory, default: collector\books\_rankings

args.name: --all
args.summary: Return all matched results instead of truncating to --limit

args.name: --min-rating/--max-rating
args.summary: Rating range filter, e.g. --min-rating 8.5 --max-rating 9.8

args.name: --min-shelf/--max-shelf
args.summary: Historical shelf count range filter

args.name: --min-current-read/--max-current-read
args.summary: Current/in-reading count range filter

args.name: --min-total-read/--max-total-read
args.summary: Total read count range filter

args.name: --min-words/--max-words
args.summary: Word count range filter

args.name: --min-chapters/--max-chapters
args.summary: Chapter count range filter

args.name: --status
args.summary: Status filter: completed, serializing, or raw status codes; comma-separated

args.name: --include/--exclude
args.summary: Text include/exclude filters across title, author, category, tags, abstract
